**UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES — Periodic Transaction Report**

Stamp: HAND DELIVERED. Legislative Resource Center, 18 MAY 10 PM 1:07, Office of the Clerk, U.S. House of Representatives. (For Official Use Only)

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: ____ (File an original and 1 copy)
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? [ ] Yes  [X] No
- Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report: [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment
- Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)

Transaction grid: header row only. First data row reads "Please see the attached"; remaining grid rows are blank.

Example row (greyed, ignored): JT — Mega Corp. Common Stock — Sale — 02/05/015 — 03/07/15 — amount col B.
